en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Environmental License in the Honduras Environmental License Applicability Assessment questionnaire.\t

The Environmental License, issued by the Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment (MiAmbiente+/SERNA) and required by General Environmental Law, Decree No. 104-93 (Article 19), is a mandatory license for all projects, activities or works that may significantly impact the environment. The law and associated regulations require an environmental impact assessment, resulting in a license, before such projects can commence. More information on the procedure of obtaining a certificate can be found here.
Please upload your Environmental License issued by the  Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment (MiAmbiente+/SERNA).
The expiration date of the company's Environmental License will appear on the license itself. This license typically valid for 5 years past the issue date.
Please enter the expiration date of your Environmental License.
The issue date of the company's Environmental License will appear on the license itself.
